title: Stripe — Financial Infrastructure to Grow Your Revenue
description: Stripe is a financial services platform that helps all types of businesses accept payments, build flexible billing models and manage money movement.

footer.colophon: © 2026 Forge-static approximation of stripe.com — authored by PlausiDen-Forge for substrate validation. Not affiliated with Stripe, Inc.

sections.title: Financial Infrastructure to Grow Your Revenue.
sections.lede: Stripe is a financial services platform that helps all types of businesses accept payments, build flexible billing models and manage money movement.

sections.text: Forge-static approximation of stripe.com authored from SSR-extractable headings + descriptions. Pixel-rep rotation target per PlausiDen-Forge #221. Not affiliated with Stripe; the substrate uses Stripe as a reference shape for the editorial_purity_gate's solution-tile audit.

sections.heading: Flexible solutions for every business model.

items.value: Accept and optimise payments globally — online and in person.
items.hint: Cards, wallets, bank debits, BNPL, and crypto. Real-time decline-rate optimisation. Unified API across 195+ countries.
Subscriptions, metered, hybrid, one-off invoices, dunning, revenue recognition. Same API regardless of the pricing shape.
Virtual + physical cards under your brand. Programmatic spend controls, real-time authorisation hooks, integrated ledger.
Embedded financial accounts, ACH + wire, multi-currency, stablecoins + crypto for cross-border treasury without correspondent friction.
Marketplace + SaaS-platform payouts. Multi-party transactions with revenue-sharing rules expressed declaratively.
Agent-driven shopping flows + agent-to-agent transactions. Same identity + idempotency primitives that ship on the human-facing checkout.

sections.body: The backbone of global commerce. Businesses on Stripe generated US$1.9tn in 2025; 150k+ users have their best day ever on Stripe.

items.hint: Cross-channel unification: in-vehicle, kiosk, web, mobile — one ledger, one reconciliation pipeline.

items.value: URBN consolidates $5 billion in online and in-store revenue onto Stripe.
items.hint: Multi-brand retail group (Urban Outfitters, Anthropologie, Free People) on a unified payment + treasury stack.

items.value: Instacart powers online grocery delivery with Stripe.
items.hint: Multi-party marketplace economics (shopper, retailer, customer) executed via Connect.

items.value: Le Monde improves local and international payments with Stripe.
items.hint: Subscription + one-off article-paywall billing across multiple currencies + regulatory regimes.

sections.text: Reliable, extensible infrastructure for every stack.

Connect to existing systems. Scale with confidence. Choose an integration path. The substrate ships SDKs in 7 languages with parity-tested client behaviour and stable wire shapes pinned via semver discipline.
